title: Positive flow: Open the app and verify the list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating
test_steps: Open the Gluten-Free app. | Verify that the app bar displays the app name 'Gluten-Free' and subtitle '33 places'. | Navigate to the list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants. | Verify that the list is sorted by rating. | Check that each restaurant row contains details such as name, cuisine type, address, rating, and status (Open/Closed).
expected_result: The app opens successfully. | The app bar is displayed correctly. | The list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants is sorted by rating. | Each restaurant row contains the expected details.

title: Negative flow: Attempt to sort the list by an invalid option
test_steps: Open the Gluten-Free app. | Navigate to the list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants. | Click on the 'Sort' dropdown. | Select an invalid sorting option (e.g., 'Distance'). | Verify that the list remains sorted by rating.
expected_result: The app opens successfully. | The app bar is displayed correctly. | The list remains sorted by rating.

title: Boundary/validation: Verify the filter section works as expected
test_steps: Open the Gluten-Free app. | Navigate to the list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants. | Click on the 'Place Type' dropdown. | Select 'Takeaway'. | Click on the 'Cuisine' dropdown. | Select 'Gluten-Free'. | Click on the 'Sort' dropdown. | Select 'Rating'. | Verify that the list updates to show only gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating.
expected_result: The app opens successfully. | The app bar is displayed correctly. | The list updates to show only gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating.

title: Toggle state: Verify the filter section toggles correctly
test_steps: Open the Gluten-Free app. | Navigate to the list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants. | Click on the 'Place Type' dropdown. | Select 'Takeaway'. | Click on the 'Cuisine' dropdown. | Select 'Gluten-Free'. | Click on the 'Sort' dropdown. | Select 'Rating'. | Verify that the list updates to show only gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating. | Click on the 'Place Type' dropdown. | Select 'All'. | Click on the 'Cuisine' dropdown. | Select 'Gluten-Free'. | Click on the 'Sort' dropdown. | Select 'Rating'. | Verify that the list updates to show all gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating.
expected_result: The app opens successfully. | The app bar is displayed correctly. | The list updates to show only gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating. | The list updates to show all gluten-free takeaway restaurants sorted by rating.

title: Clickable buttons: Verify restaurant details can be clicked
test_steps: Open the Gluten-Free app. | Navigate to the list of gluten-free takeaway restaurants. | Click on a restaurant row. | Verify that the restaurant details page is displayed.
expected_result: The app opens successfully. | The app bar is displayed correctly. | The restaurant details page is displayed.
